title: pinus fremontiana
intro: Pinus fremontiana, also known as the Coulter pine, is a species of evergreen tree in the pine family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pinus fremontiana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Pinus fremontiana can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
